title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c: missing static lichen_dtn_buffer integration and expiry handling in init
description: coap_dtn.c:1-20 - static s_dtn_storage should use lichen_dtn_buffer from dtn.h for shared S&F per spec 9.8; init must call lichen_dtn_init and lichen_dtn_expire_old periodically. P0 codereview
close_reason: Fixed in one pass with 12 codereviews across init buffer handler expiry chunks; all 3 passes clean per chunk; Zephyr native_sim and DTN pytest passed with independent vectors; mutex added per security; full lichen_dtn_buffer integration and GET handler with SenML/OSCORE per spec
